config.content.title: Cookie Policy
config.content.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide a better experience, remember your preferences, and understand how the site is used.
config.toc.items:
What Are Cookies|Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide a better experience and remember your preferences.
Types of Cookies We Use|We use essential cookies (required for the site to function), preference cookies (to remember your settings), analytics cookies (to improve our services), and sometimes marketing cookies (with your consent).
Managing Cookies|You can control or delete cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of the website.
Third-Party Cookies|We may allow trusted third parties to set cookies for analytics or other permitted purposes. Their use is governed by their respective privacy policies.
Updates|We may update this Cookie Policy to reflect changes in practice or regulation. Please check this page periodically.

notes: Cookie政策页面布局，继承首页头尾
